name: Classic Omelet
steps: Beat eggs with salt and pepper.
Melt butter in pan over medium heat.
Pour eggs, swirl, fold, serve.

name: Garlic Fried Rice
steps: Cook rice; let it cool.
Fry minced garlic in oil.
Add rice and soy sauce; toss.
Push aside, scramble egg, mix in.

name: Tomato Pasta
steps: Boil pasta in salted water.
Saute garlic in olive oil; add chopped tomato.
Toss pasta with sauce and basil.

name: Chicken Stir-Fry
steps: Slice chicken thin.
Stir-fry garlic, ginger, onion in oil.
Add chicken, cook through.
Add pepper and soy sauce; toss.

name: Chickpea Curry
steps: Saute onion, garlic, ginger in oil.
Add curry powder, then tomato.
Add chickpeas and coconut milk; simmer 15 min.

name: Caesar Salad
steps: Whisk lemon, garlic, olive oil.
Toss with lettuce.
Top with parmesan and croutons.

name: Mushroom Risotto
steps: Saute onion, garlic in butter.
Add rice, toast briefly.
Add broth one ladle at a time, stirring, until creamy.
Stir in mushrooms and parmesan.

name: Black Bean Tacos
steps: Saute onion in oil with cumin.
Add beans, mash slightly, warm through.
Fill tortillas; top with lime and cilantro.

name: Banana Pancakes
steps: Mash bananas, whisk with eggs and milk.
Stir in flour, sugar, baking powder.
Cook spoonfuls on greased pan until golden.

name: Lentil Soup
steps: Saute onion, carrot, celery, garlic in oil.
Add cumin and lentils.
Pour broth; simmer 25 min until lentils soft.

name: Grilled Cheese
steps: Butter bread on outside.
Sandwich cheese between slices.
Toast in pan both sides until golden.

name: Shakshuka
steps: Saute onion, pepper, garlic in olive oil.
Add spices, then tomatoes; simmer 10 min.
Crack eggs on top, cover, cook till set.
